simplega.core module

class simplega.core.GeneticAlgorithm(fitness_func, population_size=100, gene_length=10, generations=100, crossover_rate=0.8, mutation_rate=0.1, selection_type='tournament', crossover_type='single_point', mutation_type='bit_flip')[source]

class simplega.GeneticAlgorithm(fitness_func, population_size=100, gene_length=10, generations=100, crossover_rate=0.8, mutation_rate=0.1, selection_type='tournament', crossover_type='single_point', mutation_type='bit_flip')[source]
